svg.title: Elastic Observability MCP App — request flow
svg.desc: Six numbered steps showing how a user query flows from Claude through the MCP server to Elastic and back. Steps 1, 2, 3, and 6 happen in the Claude and user layer on the left; steps 4 and 5 happen in the MCP server and Elastic layer on the right.
svg.text: * The interactive widget also calls server tools directly for drill-down — keeping LLM context small
